solution_summary: Implement a premium customer segment with differentiated features and support by modifying existing models that handle bookings, flights, and seat inventory.
implementation_steps: Define new attributes for premium customer segmentation in the booking, flight, and seat inventory models.
Implement feature enhancements that provide premium customers with unique benefits (e.g., priority boarding, additional baggage, personalized support).
Integrate these enhancements into the existing customer segmentation logic.

planned_changes.change_summary: Add premium customer handling logic and features
planned_changes.rationale: To ensure bookings for premium customers are managed with their specific needs.

planned_changes.change_summary: Modify flight features to include premium customer options
planned_changes.rationale: To enhance the flying experience for premium customers.
To ensure premium customers have access to their respective preferences.

patch_strategy: Create a new feature branch from the main branch, implement the changes, and ensure proper collaboration and code reviews before merging back into the main branch.
validation_steps: Run unit tests to verify changes in each model.
Conduct integration testing to ensure new features work seamlessly with existing functionalities.
Gather feedback from stakeholders regarding the premium features.
pr_body: This PR introduces support and features tailored for premium customers, enhancing their experience by providing targeted benefits and support.
risks: Potential impact on existing customer segmentation logic and models if not integrated carefully.
Inadequate testing may lead to unforeseen issues after deployment.
assumptions: The existing models have sufficient extensibility for integrating premium features in a backward-compatible way.
Stakeholder feedback will be incorporated before finalizing the implementation.
